profile.name: Naveen Ramisetty
profile.headline: Enterprise Integration & Data Analyst — returning to tech building with AI
profile.summary: Enterprise integration and data specialist with 23 years across CRM, SOA, and B2B systems, and 15 years of parallel volunteer work in agrarian policy research and farmer welfare advocacy in Telangana.
intro_paragraphs: I have 20+ years of experience in enterprise applications, integration architecture, CRM/ERP platforms, and data engineering. I worked in IT from 2003–2014 at Ciena and Infosys, then led social-impact research and policy analytics — and I am now setting up a personal learning environment to understand the AI ecosystem while building real apps.
My focus today: agents, skills, and markdown-based instruction files — paired with hands-on projects in Python, dashboards, and automation.
